look at the nix flake in the beebo rig or /home/slwst/dev/slwst/forks/gastown/flake.nix as an example.  This flake should build the mg binary via `nix flake build .#`  A version is passed in via LDFLAGS, the Makefile in the project shows this usage.  This feature should be pushed to a branch feat/add-nix-flake in the fork repo, AND MUST NOT BE MERGED TO MAIN OR PUSHED UPSTREAM without human review.  our workflow will be to create the feature branch, perform development and land all development in the fork (slwst/mardi_gras) feature branch.  A human operator will validate and open a PR to the upstream if the change is deemed successful.
